name: visionflow-root
description: Root orchestrator to run backend and frontend simultaneously

scripts.start: concurrently "python api-gateway/local_proxy.py" "node services/project_service_node/server.js" "python services/dataset_service/app.py" "python services/training-service/app.py" "python services/inference_service/app.py" "cd apps/web && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix services/project_service_node install && npm --prefix apps/web install && pip install -r requirements.txt
